slots.top: A buyer who sends one clean offer in budget by Friday at 5
slots.bottom: A buyer who sends 47 Zillow links at 2am and three of them are in Tennessee

caption_draft.ig: I have read the same Zillow listing fourteen times. The buyer has not opened the pre-approval letter once.
caption_draft.x: Three of the links were in Tennessee.

calibration_notes: Specific time (Friday at 5, 2am), specific count (47, three), specific place (Tennessee — the TikTok house tour pipeline). Drake's approve panel is the worse option, which subverts the format and reflects what actually happens. Caption adds the fourteen-times beat plus the unread pre-approval, doubling down on the agent's suffering.
